what_it_does: Defines a static design-system preview card for JetBrains Mono, showing a URL specimen, a command-line code block, and small metadata about weights and intended uses.
observations: Uses an @dsCard comment with Brand group, Mono — JetBrains Mono name, subtitle, and 700x220 viewport metadata.
Links to _card.css and relies on CSS custom properties for typography, color, spacing radius, and backgrounds.
The card layout is a padded vertical flex column with specimen text, a dark code block, and a metadata row.
The URL specimen highlights one path segment in accent gold and one in muted foreground color.
The code block shows a conceptv publish command with a separately colored prompt marker.
standouts: Pairs mono typography with URL and CLI examples rather than alphabet samples.
Uses tokenized design variables throughout the local CSS.
Includes usage metadata directly in the rendered card.
conventions: Keeps preview-specific styling inline in the HTML file.
Uses semantic text elements for specimen and metadata while relying on classes for presentation.
Uses short utility-like class names for span-level color treatment.
Places design-system card metadata in an HTML comment before the html element.
concerns: The file depends on external token definitions and font setup from _card.css, which are not visible in this file.
The document title is generic compared with the card metadata.
notes: A compact mono type specimen card demonstrating JetBrains Mono for URLs, IDs, and command/code samples.
questions: Is the @dsCard comment consumed by a preview generator or catalog tool?
Are JetBrains Mono and the referenced CSS variables defined by _card.css?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose matches the content: the file presents JetBrains Mono for URLs, IDs, and code samples through a URL, CLI block, and metadata.
intention_signals: It appears intended to document and visually validate the mono typography role in the design system using realistic ConceptV URL and command examples.
novelty: A mono font card uses product-specific URL and publishing command specimens to show brand and developer contexts together.
contribution: Provides a file-local mono typography preview pattern with tokenized styling, usage metadata, and concrete URL/CLI examples that a fused system could retain as a substrate for code, identifier, and URL presentation.
summary_for_embedding: Static HTML design-system preview card for JetBrains Mono showing a styled URL, a dark command-line block, and metadata for weights and usage.
intention_for_embedding: Created to demonstrate the mono typeface role for URLs, IDs, and code samples within a ConceptV brand preview card.
